evals.name: intent-first kickoff
evals.prompt: Start a cross-team storage migration that needs an exploratory probe before implementation.
expectations: Create an open entry before implementation

evals.name: single-PR shipped close
evals.prompt: The parser refactor is implemented and tested; journal it in this PR.

evals.name: paused remains open
evals.prompt: Pause the cache investigation until new hardware arrives.
expectations: Do not invent a paused status

evals.name: measured no-go
evals.prompt: The prototype regressed p99 by 18 percent, so close the effort without shipping.

evals.name: invalid supersession
evals.prompt: Mark this entry superseded by 2026-08-01-new-design, which has not been created.
expectations: Do not create the target silently

evals.name: stale index
evals.prompt: The journal entry says shipped but the README index still says open. Reconcile it.

evals.name: backlog reconciliation
evals.prompt: This shipped effort completed one backlog item and left a new deferred measurement.
expectations: Remove or close the completed backlog item
Add the deferred item with a journal link

evals.name: problem brief candidate
evals.prompt: Reconcile an entry containing a durable problem statement, constraints, and production evidence.

evals.name: design brief candidate
evals.prompt: Reconcile an entry comparing three designs and explaining the selected tradeoff.

evals.name: trivial change
evals.prompt: Fix a typo in one comment.
expectations: Do not create a journal entry
